profile.title: Profile
profile.saveError: Couldn't update your profile. Try again.
profile.operationalAlertsDescription: Receive admin alerts when background jobs fail permanently.
profile.notificationsSaveError: Couldn't update notification preference. Try again.
profile.cockpitNotificationsDescription: Toast visible attention events here, or send web push when you are away.
profile.webPushUnsupported: This browser does not support web push notifications.

security.enabledDescription: Two-factor authentication is enabled for your account
security.disabledDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account
security.confirmPasswordPrompt: Confirm your password to set up two-factor authentication.
security.scanQrPrompt: Scan this with your authenticator app
security.addKeyToApp: Add this key to your authenticator app (Authy, Google Authenticator, etc.):
security.saveBackupCodes: Save these backup codes in a safe place:
security.verifyPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to verify setup.
security.disablePrompt: Enter your password to disable two-factor authentication.
security.terminalDescription: Control the extra confirmation required before opening browser terminals.
security.terminalRequires2FA: Enable 2FA to use the terminal step-up relaxation setting.
security.terminalRelaxDescription: When enabled, owned terminals can open without a fresh password and 2FA check.
security.passwordDescription: Change the password used for email sign-in.
security.passwordSessionRevocation: Changing your password signs out your other sessions.
security.currentPasswordMismatch: The current password is not correct.
security.passwordChangeError: Could not change password. Try again.
